mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_TBL B JOIN MEMBER_TBL M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
B.BOARD_STATUS = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 2
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_THUMB, B.BOARD_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE,
M.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BOARD_WRITER, M.MEMBER_THUMB
FROM BOARD_TBL B
JOIN MEMBER_TBL M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
B.BOARD_STATUS = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 2
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO ASC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL ( MEMBER_NO, BOARD_CATEGORY, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, PLACE_NO ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{boardCategory}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardThumb}, #{placeNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.MEMBER_NO, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.BOARD_THUMB, B.BOARD_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE, B.PLACE_NO,
M.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BOARD_WRITER, M.MEMBER_THUMB,
P.PLACE_NAME
FROM BOARD_TBL B
JOIN MEMBER_TBL M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
JOIN BOARD_PLACE_TBL P ON B.PLACE_NO = P.PLACE_NO
WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
